headline: Emerging Currencies Plunge 3% on US Iran Strikes

article.title: Emerging Currencies Slide as US Forces Launch New Iran Strikes
article.summary: Most emerging-market currencies weakened on Wednesday as the US launched a new wave of strikes against Iran after threatening to reimpose an oil embargo, renewing fears of a prolonged conflict and bolstering oil prices.

headline: CFTC Clarity Act Nears August 1 Deadline

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.
